title: angelica angustifolia
intro: Angelica angustifolia, also known as dwarf angelica or narrow-leaf angelica, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of angelica angustifolia include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of angelica angustifolia include teas, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
